name: Hoggan
text: At the beginning of your opponent's battle, play this card from your hand as a Limited Summon. Your opponent must battle this card in place of your primary creature. This card can be damaged as a Limited Summon. Send this card to your cemetery after battle.

effects.actionText: Summon or interact with a Limited Summon
